title: Nutty Crumbly Sausage Crumble
description: A quick and easy weeknight Egyptian dish featuring a nutty, crumbly sausage crumble recipe suitable for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: Almonds
ingredients.notes: Roasted for added texture and flavor

ingredients.name: Nutella (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a sweeter, more decadent crumble

instructions: Grind almonds and cashews into fine crumbs in a food processor or blender.
Mix sausage with ground nuts and add any desired Nutella for extra richness. Mix well.
Press the mixture onto a lined baking sheet and bake for about 25 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve immediately as a snack or use as a topping for oatmeal or yogurt.
